queries.query: Commit only the staged files with a detailed message.
Write a rich Conventional Commits message and commit what is already staged.
This feature branch has an open draft PR; commit the staged fix with details.
HEAD is detached at origin/main; commit the staged docs update with a detailed message.
Stage these files and then commit them.
Amend the previous commit with my unstaged changes.
queries.notes: Amend and unstaged work are out of scope

queries.query: Commit everything, push the branch, and open a pull request.
queries.notes: Push and PR creation are out of scope

queries.query: Commit only what is already staged with a detailed Conventional Commits message, then push the branch and create a pull request.
queries.notes: Hard negative: staged detailed commit combined with push and PR creation

queries.query: Stage the unstaged and untracked files, then commit them with a detailed Conventional Commits message.
queries.notes: Hard negative: staging combined with a detailed Conventional Commit

queries.query: Amend the previous commit using the already-staged changes with a detailed Conventional Commits message, then force-push it.
queries.notes: Hard negative: amend and force-push combined with positive trigger wording

queries.query: Commit only the staged files with a detailed Conventional Commits message, then rebase the branch onto main.
queries.notes: Hard negative: rebase combined with positive trigger wording
